steps.speaker: Iruka
steps.text: To be a shinobi is to carry the weight of the village on your shoulders — not just the jutsu you know, but the scrolls you command and the bonds you forge.

steps.speaker: Iruka
steps.text: Today you choose your foundation: the Taijutsu, Ninjutsu, or Genjutsu Scroll. Choose wisely. Your journey begins now.
You take up your scroll and step forward. The instructors read out the squads... you are assigned to Team 7.

steps.speaker: Naruto
steps.text: This is it! No more Academy games. I'm gonna be the best Tactician this village has ever seen — believe it!

steps.speaker: Sasuke
steps.text: Hn. Just don't slow me down.

steps.speaker: Sakura
steps.text: Cha! Try to keep up, Naruto. Sasuke-kun, look — my first contract seal!

steps.speaker: Kakashi
steps.text: Yo. I'm your sensei, Kakashi Hatake. ...Sorry I'm late. Meet me at the Training Grounds when you're ready — there's a little bell test first.
